title: Top Precision Ag YouTube Channels
description: 15 precision agriculture YouTube channels ranked by subscribers (2026-07-12): median 2,370, leader 17,600, contact-availability counts.
answer_first: The largest precision agriculture channel in this July 12, 2026 snapshot is Syfero Synergetics with 17,600 subscribers. Across all 15 channels tracked, the median audience is 2,370 subscribers, and 4 of 15 list a public business contact. Since the 2026-07-12 snapshot, 8 channels are new to the ranking and the median audience moved from 2,720 to 2,370 subscribers. The full ranking below shows subscribers, video count, country, and whether each channel lists a public contact.
facts: 15 channels qualified for this ranking, with a combined 70,690 subscribers (fetched 2026-07-12).
The median channel has 2,370 subscribers; the leader, Syfero Synergetics, has 17,600.
4 of 15 channels list a public business contact; this page publishes only that yes/no aggregate, never an address.
Together the 15 channels have published 1,939 videos.
India is the most common base, home to 5 of the 15 channels.
Since 2026-07-12: 8 channels newly ranked; median subscribers 2,720 to 2,370.

faq.q: How was this channel ranking built?
faq.a: Channels were discovered by an automated keyword search for 'precision agriculture' and ranked by subscriber count; 15 channels qualified in the 2026-07-12 capture. All figures are public YouTube statistics from the fetch date.

faq.q: Can I get contact details for these channels?
faq.a: Not from this page - it reports only the aggregate that 4 of 15 channels list a public business contact. Running the source actor yourself surfaces whatever contact route each channel makes public.

faq.q: How big is a typical precision agriculture channel?
faq.a: The median in this 15-channel sample is 2,370 subscribers, far below the leader's 17,600 - audience size in the niche is heavily top-weighted.

faq.q: How often does this ranking update?
faq.a: Subscriber and video counts move daily; this page reflects the 2026-07-12 run and refreshes on the same URL, re-ranking all 15 channels and noting changes against the prior snapshot.
